'''Tenfour''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] assigned to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos's]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Skorp-Ion]]'', during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] around the time of the [[Battle of Rendili]].

{{Droid-stub}}

*[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] {{1st}}
